requirements.summary: Create admin kill-switch dashboard with system status, emergency pause, budget display, and transaction monitoring
acceptanceCriteria: Emergency pause button immediately updates system state
Budget remaining displays current balance in INR
Transaction count shows total processed transactions
All controls are functional and update backend state

file_operations.description: Create admin dashboard component displaying system status indicator (Active/Paused/Frozen), emergency pause button, budget remaining in INR, and transaction count monitor. Include real-time polling for status updates and emergency pause functionality that calls backend methods to freeze the system.

Create custom hook to fetch and manage system status, budget remaining, and transaction count from backend. Implement polling mechanism for real-time updates and expose methods to trigger emergency pause.
Wire AdminDashboard component into the app router. Add navigation link or route to access the admin dashboard view.

requirements.summary: Build transaction processing interface for benefit claims with three-gate validation display and real-time history
acceptanceCriteria: User can input Citizen_ID and select scheme from available options
Interface displays results from eligibility, budget, and frequency gates
Approval or rejection is clearly shown with specific reason
Transaction history updates immediately after processing

file_operations.description: Create transaction submission form component with Citizen_ID text input (12-digit validation), scheme dropdown selector, and submit button. Display validation results for all three gates (eligibility, budget, frequency) showing pass/fail status for each. Show clear approval or rejection message with detailed reason after submission.

Create transaction history component displaying list of processed transactions with timestamp, Citizen_ID, scheme, amount, and status. Implement real-time updates after each new transaction is processed.

Create custom hook to handle transaction submission logic, calling backend methods to process benefit claims. Manage loading states, validation gate results, approval/rejection responses, and error handling. Returns JSX for rendering validation gate results.
Wire TransactionForm and TransactionHistory components into the main app view. Ensure both components are visible and functional on the primary user interface.

requirements.summary: Create beautiful, professional UI with modern design patterns emphasizing security features
acceptanceCriteria: UI uses cohesive color scheme and typography
Interface is responsive across screen sizes
User actions provide clear visual feedback

file_operations.description: Define cohesive color scheme, professional typography, and custom CSS variables for the Jan-Dhan Gateway application. Establish primary, secondary, and accent colors that emphasize security and trust. Add utility classes for consistent spacing and visual feedback states.

Configure Tailwind theme with custom colors for security emphasis (e.g., trust blue, alert red, success green), professional font families, responsive breakpoints, and shadow/border utilities for clean layout. Extend theme to support security badge styling and status indicators.

Create main layout component with responsive navigation, header featuring Jan-Dhan Gateway branding, and container structure for clean, professional presentation. Include visual indicators for security features and system status in the header. Use shadcn/ui components for consistent styling. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Wrap application content with Layout component to apply consistent branding and structure across all views. Ensure responsive behavior and professional presentation.
